title: Economic Survey 2023-24
text: Government Report: Economic Survey 2023-24. Chief Economic Adviser V. Anantha Nageswaran. GDP growth 8.2% FY24. India fastest growing major economy. Inflation moderated to 5.4%. Fiscal deficit at 5.6% of GDP. Capex surge driving growth. Recommends 7% growth target sustained.

title: CAG Report on Implementation of MGNREGS
text: Government Report: CAG Audit of MGNREGS (2023). Key findings: ₹3,700 crore funds diverted in 10 states. Ghost workers detected through Aadhaar mismatches. Wage payment delays exceeded 15 days in 40% cases. Material-labour ratio violated in 25% of works. Recommendations for biometric attendance.

title: Annual Report of Ministry of Railways
text: Government Report: Ministry of Railways Annual Report 2024. Revenue: ₹2.56 lakh crore. Freight loading: 1,591 MT. Passenger revenue: ₹72,000 crore. Capital expenditure: ₹2.55 lakh crore (highest ever). 136 Vande Bharat trains launched. 95% electrification complete.

title: NITI Aayog SDG India Index
text: Government Report: NITI Aayog SDG India Index 2024. Top states: Kerala (75), Tamil Nadu (74), Himachal Pradesh (73). Bottom: Bihar (52), Jharkhand (53). National score: 66/100. Improvement in clean water, sanitation, education. Gaps in: hunger, inequality, climate action.

title: NSO Periodic Labour Force Survey (PLFS)
text: Government Report: PLFS Annual Report 2024. Unemployment rate: 3.2% (lowest in 7 years). Youth (15-29) unemployment: 10.2%. Female LFPR improved to 37%. Self-employed: 57.3%. Regular wage/salaried: 21.7%. Casual labour: 21%. Urban unemployment higher than rural.

title: Swachh Survekshan 2024
text: Government Report: Swachh Survekshan 2024. Cleanest city: Indore (7th consecutive time). Top 3: 1. Indore, 2. Surat, 3. Navi Mumbai. Cleanest state: Maharashtra. 4,476 cities surveyed. Parameters: service level, certification, citizen feedback. Promotes competitive cleanliness.
